highlights.description: LangChainGo adapter for omnillm - use any omnillm provider with LangChainGo chains, agents, and RAG pipelines

added.description: `New()` function to create LangChainGo `llms.Model` from omnillm provider
Full `llms.Model` interface implementation with `GenerateContent()` and `Call()` methods
Tool/function calling support with automatic conversion between LangChainGo and omnillm formats
All LangChainGo call options: temperature, max tokens, top-p, stop words, seed
Token usage tracking in `GenerationInfo` response metadata
Message role mapping between LangChainGo and omnillm (system, user, assistant, tool)

fixed.description: Add error handling for unsupported content types (ImageURLContent, BinaryContent)
Add default case in message conversion switch for unknown content types

tests.description: Unit tests for `New()`, `GenerateContent()`, `Call()`, role mapping, and tool conversion

documentation.description: README with installation, usage examples (omnillm, omnillm-core, chains, tools, streaming), and architecture diagram
